description: Free, embeddable time zone converter widgets. Each widget shows live clocks and an interactive hour converter for a specific timezone pair. Embed via iframe with auto-resizing.

widgets.title: PST to EST Time Zone Converter
widgets.embed_iframe: <iframe src="https://timehopperapp.com/embed/pst-to-est.html" width="100%" height="420" style="border:none;border-radius:12px;max-width:600px;" loading="lazy" title="PST to EST Time Zone Converter — TimeHopper"></iframe>
